nodes.name: Trigger A: Daily Class Check (20:00)
nodes.notes: Runs daily at 20:00 after classes have ended. Checks whether any class dropped in attendance vs its 4-week rolling average. Fires survey if threshold breached for 2+ consecutive sessions.

nodes.name: Trigger B: Daily Studio Check-In Check (22:00)
nodes.notes: Runs daily at 22:00. Checks whether total studio check-ins today dropped more than 20% vs the prior 7-day average. Fires survey to all active members if threshold is met.

nodes.name: Load Class Attendance Data
nodes.notes: In production: replace with Read Binary File pointing to class_attendance.csv or HTTP Request to gym booking system. Required fields: class_id, session_date, attendees (today), four_week_avg, consecutive_low_sessions, attendee_ids.

nodes.name: Load Studio Check-In Data
nodes.notes: In production: replace with aggregated check-in count from fitness_user_metrics.csv. today_checkins = total unique member check-ins today. seven_day_avg = average of prior 7 days.

nodes.name: IF: Class Threshold Breached?
nodes.notes: TRUE: proceed to survey eligibility check. FALSE: stop — no survey needed today.

nodes.name: IF: Studio Threshold Breached?
nodes.notes: TRUE: proceed to survey eligibility check. FALSE: stop — check-in drop not significant enough.

nodes.name: Load Survey Sent Log (Class)
nodes.notes: In production: replace with Read Binary File pointing to survey_sent_log.csv. Fields: member_id, last_survey_sent (ISO date). Used to enforce 5-week cooldown per member.

nodes.name: Load Survey Sent Log (Studio)
nodes.notes: Same log, separate node. In production: both nodes point to the same survey_sent_log.csv.

nodes.name: Filter: Cooldown Check (Class)
nodes.notes: Enforces 5-week (35-day) cooldown per member regardless of how many triggers fire. A member never receives more than one survey in any 5-week period.

nodes.name: IF: Eligible Members (Class)?
nodes.notes: TRUE: at least one member is eligible (not in cooldown). FALSE: all candidates already surveyed in the past 5 weeks — stop here.

nodes.name: IF: Eligible Members (Studio)?
nodes.notes: TRUE: at least one member is eligible. FALSE: all active members already surveyed in the past 5 weeks — stop here.

nodes.name: Format Survey Email (Class)
nodes.notes: Replace YOUR_FORM_ID with your Tally.so form ID. The member_id is passed as a URL query parameter and used by Tally to tag the response. Member names are never used.

nodes.name: Send Survey Email (Class)
nodes.notes: In production: toEmail should resolve to the member's actual email address from the gym management system. In this demo, member_id is used as a placeholder.

nodes.name: Log Survey Sent (Class)
nodes.notes: In production: use a Write Binary File node to append to survey_sent_log.csv. This log is read by both trigger paths to enforce the 5-week cooldown.

nodes.name: Tally Response Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives POST from Tally.so when a member submits their survey. Configure in Tally: Settings → Webhooks → paste this n8n webhook URL. Tally sends member_id (from the URL parameter), rating, free_text, and wants_checkin.

nodes.name: Parse and Log Survey Response
nodes.notes: Standardises Tally's webhook payload to match survey_responses.csv schema. The weekly email workflow reads this file each Monday. member_id comes from the hidden field pre-filled when the survey link was sent.

nodes.name: Monthly Survey Summary Trigger
nodes.notes: Fires on the 1st of every month at 08:00. Triggers the monthly survey summary email to the studio owner covering all responses from the previous calendar month.

nodes.name: Load Monthly Survey Responses
nodes.notes: In production: replace demo array with Read Binary File → parse CSV → filter by survey_date >= first of last month AND < first of this month. Returns all responses for the previous calendar month.

nodes.name: Build Monthly Summary Email
nodes.notes: Aggregates all responses for the month: total count, avg satisfaction, avg NPS, low satisfaction count, goal progress breakdown, full response table. Outputs styled HTML email.

nodes.name: Send Monthly Survey Summary
nodes.notes: Sends monthly summary to studio owner. Use same SMTP credential as the weekly email workflow. Update toEmail to studio owner address at onboarding.

fields.label: How likely are you to recommend the gym to a friend or colleague?
How often do you visit our gym?
Overall, how satisfied are you with your gym experience?
Have you attended one of our classes?
If yes, how would you rate your class experience?
How can we improve the gym for you?
How many stars will you give the full experience in YOUR GYM?
